basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 06 Personal Assistant, Executive Engineer and More Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Madurai (AIIMS Madurai)
basic_details.post_name: Personal Assistant, Executive Engineer and More
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Madurai (AIIMS Madurai) Medical Superintendent, Superintending Engineer, Executive Engineer, Nursing Superintendent & Other Notification 2026 has been released on 28 March 2026 on the official website www.aiimsmadurai.edu.in . A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max 58 years for Medical Superintendent, 56 years for others.
age_limit.details: Medical Superintendent: Maximum age limit is 58 years. Superintending Engineer: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Executive Engineer (Electrical): Maximum age limit is 56 years. Nursing Superintendent: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Assistant Controller of Examinations: Maximum age limit is 56 years. Personal Assistant: Maximum age limit is 56 years.

qualification.details: Medical Superintendent: Medical Qualification included in the I or II schedule or Part-II of the third schedule to the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956; Post-graduate qualification (MD/MS or equivalent) OR MHA or equivalent; Ten (10) Years experience in Hospital Administration in Hospitals after obtaining the PG Degree in a senior position, preferably in Hospitals with 300 beds or more. Superintending Engineer: Degree (BE/B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from recognised universities. Officers under the Central/State/Union Territory Governments/Universities/Central Statutory/Autonomous Bodies/Public Sector Undertakings/Research & Development organizations holding analogous post OR Executive Engineers (Civil) with 5 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 7600/- (Level-12 in 7th CPC) OR Executive Engineer (Civil) with 10 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs.6600/- (Level-11 in 7th CPC). Executive Engineer (Electrical): Degree (BE / B.Tech) in Civil Engineering from recognised universities. Officers under the Central/State/U.T. Governments/Universitites/Statutory/Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organisations holding analogous posts OR Assistant Engineer (Electrical) with 5 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 5400/- (Level-10 in 7th CPC) OR Junior Engineer (Electrical) with 7 years of regular service in the grade pay of Rs. 4600/- (Level-7 in 7th CPC). Nursing Superintendent: Officers of the State / Central Government or Statutory /Autonomous Bodies holding analogous posts OR Deputy / Assistant Nursing Superintendent with 5 years regular service in the grade pay of Rs.5400/- (Level-10 in 7th CPC). Assistant Controller of Examinations: Officers under the Central / State / U.T. Governments / Universities / Statutory / Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organisations holding analogous posts on regular basis OR at least 5 years of regular service in the post in the PB 3, with Grade Pay of Rs.5400 or higher (Level-10 or higher in 7th CPC). Personal Assistant: Officers under the Central / State / U.T. Governments / Universities / Statutory, Autonomous Bodies or Research and Development Organizations: i) Holding analogous posts on regular basis, OR ii) With 10 years regular service in the grade pay of 2400 (Level-4 in 7th CPC).

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsmadurai.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
45 days from the date of publication of advertisement in the newspaper
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-05-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026 is 11th May 2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in the AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 6 vacancies announced for various posts including Medical Superintendent, Superintending Engineer, Executive Engineer (Electrical), Assistant Controller of Examination, Nursing Superintendent, and Personal Assistant.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and send it via post to the designated address.

faq.question: Q4. What is the educational qualification required for the Medical Superintendent post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Superintendent post, candidates must possess a Medical Qualification included in the Indian Medical Council Act of 1956 and a Post-graduate qualification (MD/MS or equivalent) or MHA or equivalent, along with 10 years of experience in Hospital Administration.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Superintending Engineer post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Superintending Engineer post is 56 years. For the Medical Superintendent post, the maximum age limit is 58 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Personal Assistant post?
faq.answer: The Personal Assistant post offers a salary in Pay Level 6 as per the 7th CPC, which ranges from Rs. 35,400 to Rs. 1,12,400.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The selection process for the AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026 will involve verification of documents followed by an interview of the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the application form for AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Madurai, which is www.aiimsmadurai.edu.in.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Madurai Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for this recruitment drive. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q10. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The job type for this recruitment is Deputation, meaning eligible government or autonomous body employees can apply to be posted at AIIMS Madurai.
